summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 8 P1 features for Service Hub Platform. All features working correctly: (1) Red Ops branding with pulse animation, (2) Announcement Ticker management, (3) Workflow Triggers tab, (4) Logs module with 4 tabs, (5) Integrations with API Keys and Webhooks, (6) User provisioning with Force Password Change and Force OTP Setup, (7) Team assignment in user form, (8) SLA Management with response/resolution times.

issues: Still shows 'Red Ribbon Operations Portal' instead of 'Red Ops' - minor branding inconsistency

passed_tests: P1-1: Sidebar shows 'Red Ops' branding
P1-1: Logo has pulse animation (animate-pulse-slow class)
P1-2: Announcement Ticker visible at top of all pages
P1-2: /announcements page loads with ticker settings
P1-2: Enable/disable ticker toggle works
P1-2: Message input and color pickers available
P1-2: Live preview shows ticker appearance
P1-3: /workflows page has Triggers tab
P1-3: Categories listed with workflow trigger toggles
P1-3: Trigger toggle updates category setting
P1-4: /logs page loads with System, API, UI, User tabs
P1-4: Search input for filtering logs
P1-4: Level filter dropdown (All, Error, Warning, Info, etc.)
P1-4: Auto-refresh button toggles auto-refresh
P1-4: Download button exports logs
P1-5: /integrations page loads with API Keys tab
P1-5: Webhooks tab exists and accessible
P1-5: Create API Key button opens dialog
P1-5: API key generation shows key with copy button
P1-5: Create Webhook button opens dialog
P1-6: Add User form has 'Force Password Change' toggle
P1-6: Add User form has 'Force OTP Setup' toggle
P1-7: Add User form has Team assignment dropdown
P1-7: Edit user can re-trigger security flags
P1-8: /sla page loads with SLA Management
P1-8: Create SLA button opens dialog
P1-8: SLA form has name, response time, resolution time inputs
P1-8: SLA can be assigned to role or team
action_items: MINOR: Update login page footer from 'Red Ribbon Operations Portal' to 'Red Ops' for consistent branding
seed_data_creation: Created test data during testing: TEST_P1_API_Key, TEST_UI_API_Key, TEST_P1_Webhook, TEST_P1_SLA - all created via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified working. Backend endpoints: /api/logs/{type}, /api/api-keys, /api/webhooks, /api/sla, /api/announcement-ticker. Frontend pages: /logs, /integrations, /sla, /announcements, /workflows (with Triggers tab). User form has force_password_change, force_otp_setup toggles and team_id dropdown. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**
